text.title: Handoff Spec Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Handoff Spec Template.

example.scenario: A solo founder ships a checkout 'Place Order' button. Spec covers 8 states (loading state = spinner + disabled), motion 200ms ease-out, focus-order documented, contrast 5.2:1, edge cases (long order summary, RTL, slow network). Engineering implements without a single follow-up question.
example.trace: r1-eight-state-coverage → r2-token-references-not-raw → r4-a11y-focus-and-contrast → r5-edge-cases-named → spec stored
